com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration

Class CompleteOnlineEMV.CompleteOnlineEMVRequest

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.base.BaseRequest<ManageRequest>

    java.io.Serializable

    CompleteOnlineEMV

extends BaseRequest<ManageRequest>

      void setAuthorizationCode(java.lang.String authorizationCode) 
      void setContinuousScreen(java.lang.String continuousScreen)
      ‘0’ default.
      void setIssuerAuthenticationData(java.lang.String issuerAuthenticationData)
      If issuer authentication data (tag 91) is returned by host, it shall be * set to terminal.
      void setIssuerScript1(java.lang.String issuerScript1)
      If issuer script (tag 71) is returned by host, it shall be set to terminal.
      void setIssuerScript2(java.lang.String issuerScript2)
      If issuer script (tag 72) is returned by host, it shall be set to terminal.
      void setOnlineAuthorizationResult(java.lang.String onlineAuthorizationResult)
      0: transaction approved online
      1: transaction declined online
      2: connect host failed
      3: request partial EMV
      void setResponseCode(java.lang.String responseCode) 
      void setTagList(java.lang.String tagList)
      EMV tag list to be returned in EMV TLV data in response message.

      • CompleteOnlineEMVRequest

        public CompleteOnlineEMVRequest()

    • Method Detail

      • setIssuerAuthenticationData

        public void setIssuerAuthenticationData(java.lang.String issuerAuthenticationData)
        If issuer authentication data (tag 91) is returned by host, it shall be * set to terminal.
        Parameters:
        issuerAuthenticationData - the value of issuer authentication data(value of tag 91, without tag and length)

      • setIssuerScript1

        public void setIssuerScript1(java.lang.String issuerScript1)
        If issuer script (tag 71) is returned by host, it shall be set to terminal.
        Parameters:
        issuerScript1 - the value of issuer script(value of tag 71, without tag and length)

      • setIssuerScript2

        public void setIssuerScript2(java.lang.String issuerScript2)
        If issuer script (tag 72) is returned by host, it shall be set to terminal.
        Parameters:
        issuerScript2 - the value of issuer script(value of tag 72, without tag and length)

      • setAuthorizationCode

        public void setAuthorizationCode(java.lang.String authorizationCode)
        Parameters:
        authorizationCode - The value of Issuer Authorization Code(tag 89), without tag and length.

      • setResponseCode

        public void setResponseCode(java.lang.String responseCode)
        Parameters:
        responseCode - The value of the Host Response Code (tag 8A), without tag and length.

      • setOnlineAuthorizationResult

        public void setOnlineAuthorizationResult(java.lang.String onlineAuthorizationResult)
        0: transaction approved online
        1: transaction declined online
        2: connect host failed
        3: request partial EMV
        Parameters:
        onlineAuthorizationResult - Indicate the result of online authorization.

      • setTagList

        public void setTagList(java.lang.String tagList)

        EMV tag list to be returned in EMV TLV data in response message. All the tags are consecutive without any separator. If this field is not set, terminal will return the EMV data based on the default list.

        Default tag list: 95 Terminal Verification Result (TVR)
        9B Transaction Status Information (TSI)
        9F26 Application Cryptogram (AC)
        9F27 Cryptogram Information Data (IAD)
        9F34 Cardholder Verification Method (CVM) Result

        Example: Request for tag 0x9F26 0x9F27 0x4F, then this field would be: “9F269F274F”

        Note: Cannot request the following sensitive tags
        0x56: track 1 data
        0x57: track 2 equivalent data
        0x5A: PAN
        0x9F1F: track1 discretionary data
        0x9F6B: track 2 data (MasterCard Only)
        0x9F20: track 2 discretionary data

        Parameters:
        tagList - The tag list

      • setContinuousScreen

        public void setContinuousScreen(java.lang.String continuousScreen)
        ‘0’ default.
        ‘1’ after command is executed display doesn't go back to idle screen.
        Parameters:
        continuousScreen - Attribute: n1

      • pack

        protected ManageRequest pack()
        Specified by:
        pack in class BaseRequest<ManageRequest>
